name: novel-generator
tagline: ClawHub (71★): 根据用户提供的内容方向自动生成提示词并创作爽文小说。适用场景：(1) 用户提供小说方向/题材/关键词，(2) 需要生成章节连贯的长篇爽文，(3) 需要维护角色、地点、情节的连续性，(4) 需要为关键情节生成图解，(5) 需要记录生成失败场景以优化后
verdict: Quality is shaky: two different output formats (inline diagram vs. an image file) are offered with no rule for choosing, so two runs can diverge unpredictably. Worse, new story data gets written to memory with no duplicate check, risking corrupted entries on regeneration.

highlights.summary: Two materially different output forms (inline Mermaid text vs. a generated image file) are offered with no stated default or condition for choosing between them, so two agents coul
New-character/location/plot-point entries are written to memory files immediately after a chapter is generated with no instruction to check for an existing entry first; regeneratin
Description and body never state when NOT to use the skill or point to a better-suited alternative anywhere in the file.
